---
title: "Tool Name"
date: 2026-02-15  # Use actual date when created
categories: [tool, python]  # Options: python, r, javascript, api, database, visualization, scraper, agent, rag, etc.
status: "Testing"  # Options: Testing, Archived, Active Use
link: "https://example.com"
description: "One-line description of what this tool does"
---

## What It Does

Brief explanation of what this tool/package/resource is and what problem it solves.

## Why I Bookmarked It

What caught my attention? What use case does it solve for my workflow?

## Hello World Example

```python
# Quick example showing basic usage
import tool_name

# Your minimal working example here
result = tool_name.do_something()
print(result)
```

## Verdict

Current thoughts:
- **Pros:** What works well
- **Cons:** What doesn't
- **Status:** Am I actively using this? Testing? Archived?

## Resources

- [Official Docs](https://...)
- [GitHub Repo](https://...)
- [Tutorial I Found Useful](https://...)
